feywild_lexicon.category.bee_knight.desc: Sworn to Queen Titania of the Summer Court, Bee Knights guard sacred meadows, defending the harmony of nature and the hives they serve. To those they deem worthy, they offer their spear and loyalty—but to those who threaten the wild, they bring swift and stinging judgment.
feywild_lexicon.category.bee_knight.name: Bee Knight
feywild_lexicon.category.bellsnickel.des: Once a fearsome redcap, now merely a grump.The Bellsnickel wanders the cold reaches of the Feywild with a lantern in one hand and a giant bag of books on his back.
feywild_lexicon.category.decorative_bloc: The Feywild holds many kinds of mysterious materials from which a variety of blocks can be crafted.
feywild_lexicon.category.fey_gems.descri: When a Fey passes on to the next world, they leave behind a pinch of Fey Dust. This dust is valued by craftsmen as it can be condensed into the rare and precious Fey Ore.
feywild_lexicon.category.fey_gems.name: Fey Gems
feywild_lexicon.category.feywild.autumn_: The Autumn Court is the most mature of the four Fae Courts, their age and wisdom has given them a appreciation of fine art, music and poetry. They know the upcoming period will be a harsh one, and feel the responsibility of preparing for the end of a cycle.
feywild_lexicon.category.feywild.descrip: Fey, a treatise on the wild and whimsical.
feywild_lexicon.category.feywild.dwarves: Brought into life by the spilling of Ymirs lifeblood, the dwarves have a strong binding with the earth, fire and the mountains. This makes them excellent and skilled metalworkers and craftsmen, and they take great pride in this.
feywild_lexicon.category.feywild.fey_gem: When a Fey passes into the next world, they leave behind a small amount of Fey Dust. This dust is sought after by craftsmen, as compressing it turns it into the rare and precious Fey Ore.
feywild_lexicon.category.feywild.feywild: Fey, a treatise on the wild and whimsical.
feywild_lexicon.category.feywild.name: Feywild
feywild_lexicon.category.feywild.neutral: Not all fey are aligned to a specific Court and some are even aligned to other lesser known Courts, like the Shadow Court. There are even rumours of fey who are aligned to the stars.
feywild_lexicon.category.feywild.spring_: They represent the birth of a new year and the coming of new life and are the most innocent of the Court. They are however, notoriously obnoxious when playing pranks, as they do not know the dangers or consequences of their actions. Nor do they care about it.
feywild_lexicon.category.feywild.summer_: The Summer Court is the primary reigning Court within the Feywild and they know it. The other Courts and inhabitants of the Feywild are there to serve them, and though polite, they demand recognition of their self-claimed royal status.
feywild_lexicon.category.feywild.winter_: When leaves have fallen and the sky has turned to gray and the night has closed in on the day. That's when the Winter Court reigns supreme in the Feywild. Eventually death will come for us all and their purpose is to make sure the Feywild sees another turn of the year.
feywild_lexicon.category.mandragora.desc: The Mandragora is the counterpart of their less-charming relatives: the Mandrakes. The Mandragora is known for its soothing singing. Shy by nature, it has a very kind and nurturing heart.
feywild_lexicon.category.mandragora.name: Mandragora
feywild_lexicon.category.pixies.descript: These Fey take on the aspect of one of the seasons. Each is a representative of their seasonal court.
feywild_lexicon.category.pixies.name: Pixies
feywild_lexicon.category.shroomling.desc: The friendly, easygoing Shroomling enjoys slow strolls through the mushroom forest, occasionally waving at travelers. Ironically, it is highly allergic to its own spores.
feywild_lexicon.category.shroomling.name: Shroomling
feywild_lexicon.category.summoning_fey.d: In order to summon the Fey you will need a Fey Altar- which can be crafted in a crafting table. You can summon any fey you want, regardless of their alignment to a certain court.
feywild_lexicon.category.tree_ents.descr: The Tree Ents are Fey who, over time, came to resemble the trees they protected. They will attack anyone they deem unworthy of being in their territory-including you, unless summoned by you then they will only attack monsters!
feywild_lexicon.category.tree_ents.name: Tree Ents
feywild_lexicon.decorative_blocks.name: Decorative Blocks
The Bee Knights patrol the Golden Seelie Fields, keeping an eye out for anyone who may try to steal their sacred honey.

By right clicking your fey with a Pixie Orb, you can open the Fey Menu. Each fey has one. In this menu you can turn on/off their ability, make them follow or stay or you can dismiss them go back into the summoning scroll. The Bee Knight has an extra option for equipping their armor.
The Bee Knight will protect you or the area they reside. You can equip the mount and the knight with armor, making them strong and/or more resilient.
Both the Knight and it's noble Steed love Cookies, as most Fey do! You can give a hungry Fey cookies to restore some of their health.
Bee Knights are trained to not be afraid of Iron. Thought still vulnerable for it!
feywild_lexicon.entry.bee_knight.trade.p: The Bee Knight offers various items their bee picked up in exchange for a Fey Gem.
feywild_lexicon.entry.bellsnickel.summon: Once a fearsome redcap, now merely a grump.The Bellsnickel wanders the cold reaches of the Feywild with a lantern in one hand and a giant bag of books on his back. The lantern once used to find lost souls it now leads him to forgotten libraries and misplaced tomes. He may be sassy and stubborn, the Bellsnickel is proof that even the cruelest fey can be reformed—so long as they’re allowed to hoard their favorite stories.

By right clicking your fey with a Pixie Orb, you can open the Fey Menu. Each fey has one. In this menu you can turn on/off their ability, make them follow or stay or you can dismiss them go back into the summoning scroll.

The Bellsnickel may grumble, but he is useful. He can carry extra items for those he tolerates, storing them safely within his overstuffed bag. If given an enchanted book, a blank book, and a bottle of fey ink, Bellsnickel can carefully scribe a copy. Though he might complain.
Though he won't admit it; The Bellsnickel loves Cookies, as most Fey do! You can give a hungry Fey cookies to restore some of their health.
The Bellsnickel offers various enchanted books in exchange for a Fey Gem.
The recipe for the Elven Quartz used to be only know by the Dwarves. But ever since their great rebellion, they shared their secrets for all to know. There are colors for each season.

In the Eternal Falls, a domain of the Autumn Court, the Shroomlings reside among their colorful mushroom homes. They can grow these homes from tiny mushrooms. Some travelers may want to build their own homes with them.
Trees touched by fey magic can grow into trees with the colours of the Seasons. Saplings can be crafted or found from the fey tree leaves.
On the outside the may look like any other tree, but once stripped you can see the colourful inside.
On the outside the may look like any other tree, but once stripped you can see the colourful inside.
Fey Wood gives a colorful range of plank variety.
The leaves of the seasonal tree have a lot of color. Shearing them will preserve their form. Decaying leaves will drop saplings and a small chance of fey dust.
When a Fey passes into the next world, they leave behind a small amount of Fey Dust. This magical powder pervades all plants, creatures, and items native to the Feywild, and can be obtained in more peaceful ways by offering cookies to untamed Pixies. Alternatively, you can get Fey Dust from Fey Ore.
You can break a Fey Gem back down into dust by smelting it.
Pixies love Cookies, as most Fey do! You can give a hungry Fey cookies to restore some of their health and maybe receive a Fey Dust.
feywild_lexicon.entry.fey_gems.fey_ore.p: Fey gems are sought after by some wizards and creatures because it is a refined form of the Fey's original magic. Fey Ore can be found deep underground in the Overworld.
Condensing fey dust together can create a fey gem, but it will result in some loss of ingredients.

Cracked fey wood will spawn a hostile Tree Ent during the daytime. The link between the tree and the Tree ent can be severed by destroying the scarred wood, providing a Fey Gem. Other way around placing a fey gem inside a Fey Log will make it a scarred log.
feywild_lexicon.entry.feywild.autumn_cou: Autumn Court
Autumn Court

The Autumn Court is the most mature of the four Fae Courts, their age and wisdom has given them a appreciation of fine art, music and poetry. They rather spend a night listening to song, dancing and flirting then going to combat or mindlessly indulging themselves. They know the upcoming period will be a harsh one, and feel the responsibility of

preparing for the end of a cycle. Perhaps the most kind of the Courts, they are still capable of trickery and mischief, but they are more hush-hush about it. The Autumn Court will protect the Feywild from any evil spirits and will harvest souls who have gone astray. To honour them but also to give the lost soul one more good time before passing on to the next stage.
The Eternal Fall

In the Eternal Falls you can find giant Mushrooms. You can grow your own giant mushrooms by placing a red or brown mushroom on podzol, and grow it with bone meal. The tree mushrooms can be carefully harvested with a shear.
Autumn Pixie

The Autumn Court is the most mature of the four Fey Courts, their age and wisdom has given them a appreciation of fine art, music and poetry. Beware that when you summon a pixie, you are bound to their Court! This means other courts might not be willing to interact with you afterwards. Also note that not all pixies are willing familiars, and they might trick you! Try interacting with your pixie
after you summoned one, if possible try to gain their trust.

With this scroll you can summon a Autumn Pixie. Autumn Pixies will try to ward off any evil spirits by protecting you with a wind walk spell. The summoned pixie will follow you by shift-right clicking her, if you want her to stay at a certain location, shift-right click her again.
Pixies love cookies, as most fey do! When they are hungry you can give them a cookie and it will heal some of their health.
You can change your pixie's ability with a runestone. Dwarves will know more about these runestones.
Pixie Wings

Pixies originally didn't have wings. After the fall of Light and Dark, the Courts where divided. Not knowing where they where from the pixies longing to return to the stars gave them wings.$(br)$(br)You can receive your own Pixie Wings by completing the quest line.
You can repair pixie wings with fey dust.

The Autumn Court is the most mature of the four Fey Courts, and their age and wisdom has given them a appreciation of fine art, music and poetry. They would rather spend a night listening to songs, dancing, and flirting than going to combat or mindlessly indulging themselves. They know the upcoming period will be a harsh one, and feel the responsibility of preparing for the end of a cycle.

Perhaps the kindest of the Courts, the Autumn Fey are still fully capable of trickery and mischief; they are just more hush-hush about it. The Autumn Court will protect the Feywild from any evil spirits and harvest souls who have gone astray. To honor the lost souls, and to give them one more good time before they pass on to the next stage.
You can grow your own giant mushrooms by bone-mealing all colored mushrooms planted on podzol or myzelium, and then carefully harvest them with shears.
Shroomling
With this scroll you can summon a Shroomling. The Shroomling has some allergies for spores and will sneeze at random times.

If the area the shroomling is in, is not well lit up, it will spawn a fey mushroom to light up the area. $(p) You can easily harvest the fey mushroom and replace it. Right clicking with fey dust or bonemeal will light up the mushroom. Don't use to much or it will loose it magic.
If the Shroomling sneezes near a cow it might infect it with the

'shrooms', turning the cow into a Mooshroom. Did you know you can shear a Mooshroom, it removes the mushrooms and turn it back into a normal cow again? You can hold a bowl near a Mushroom and milk it for some fresh Mushroom Stew.
feywild_lexicon.entry.feywild.dwarves.dw: Dwarven Market
Runestones are small slabs of stone with magical properties. They can hold different kinds of magical spells. The most common are the Traveling stones, used to travel to other locations.
You can ask a dwarf you are friends with to activate an inactive rune stone. When activated it can be used to teleport to a secret location only known by the dwarves and those they trust.
Dwarven Market
At the dwarven market you can trade for all kinds of items.
This dwarf trades for all kinds of culinary items.
This dwarf trades for all kinds of farm animal items.
This dwarf trades for all kinds of armour, weapons and tools.
This dwarf trades for all kinds of artifacts and trinkets.
This dwarf trades for all kinds of stones and ore.
This dwarf trades for all kinds of monster drops.
Dwarven Anvil
Dwarves don't easily make friends with outsiders, but if you are one of the few who has earned the gratitude of a dwarf, you have a friend for life.

A summoning contract can be obtained by trading with dwarves (up to level 3). By shift-right clicking the dwarven anvil with the summoning scroll, you will bind a dwarf to that anvil. The summoned dwarf will craft for you when you place the correct recipe in the anvil. So make sure you
have a dwarf bound to the anvil.
You can replenish the mana of the anvil, by placing fey dust as fuel in the buttom-left slot of the anvil. Most special recipes require mana.

The summoned dwarf will have different trades then those found in caves or at the blacksmith. They will require a daily meal in exchange for ore. If you provide the dwarf with enough meals he will offer you his knowledge in the form of schematics.
Most recipes for the anvil will require schematics. You can place the schematics in the top-left slot of the anvil.

So to craft with the dwarven anvil make sure you have enough mana, a dwarf should be bound to the anvil, and you require the correct schematics. Once all items are placed the dwarf will start crafting for you!
Dwarves

Brought into life by the spilling of Ymirs lifeblood, the dwarves have a strong binding with the earth, fire and the mountains. This makes them excellent and skilled metalworkers and craftsmen, and they take great pride in this.
Most dwarves can be found underground mining and some have build a home, somewhere in the Feywild. If you trade alot with them, they may offer you a Summoning Contract.
feywild_lexicon.entry.feywild.dwarves.el: With this knowledge your dwarf can craft all kinds of raw elven quartz and star blocks All you have to do is provide the correct ingredients.
feywild_lexicon.entry.feywild.dwarves.ge: With the knowledge of gem transmutation your dwarf can craft you high quality fey gems. All you have to do is provide the correct ingredients.
feywild_lexicon.entry.feywild.dwarves.ma: The magical braziers magic is a mystery for now, all that is know is that it was crafted by the dwarves.
The magical braziers fire can be turned on and off with fey dust.
feywild_lexicon.entry.feywild.dwarves.ru: With this knowledge your dwarf can craft runestones. All you have to do is provide the correct ingredients. You can also replenish the mana of an inactive runestone.
This runestone will grant your pixie the ability to cast 'Flower Walk' on their owner.
This runestone will grant your pixie the ability to cast 'Fire Walk' on their owner.
This runestone will grant your pixie the ability to cast 'Frost walk' on their owner.
This runestone will grant your pixie the ability to cast 'Wind walk' on their owner.
feywild_lexicon.entry.feywild.fey_gems.e: In the Feywild Dimension you can find colorful geodes filled with star blocks.
The star blocks will contain raw elven quartz. There are five different types of quartz. Normal and one representing each season.
Combining the raw quartz will create a elven quartz block. These blocks can be used to create all kinds of blocks using a stonecutter.
feywild_lexicon.entry.feywild.fey_gems.f: When a Fey passes into the next world, they leave behind a small amount of Fey Dust. Breaking the fey trees will also provide you with fey dust. Fey Dust is also obtained by heating up fey ore.

Fey gems are very wanted by some creatures and wizards because it still contains some of the Fey's original magic. Be careful when mining the Fey ore as it is fragile and putting too much pressure on the ore can lower the quality of the excavated Fey Gems.
Fey Ore can only be found in the Feywild Dimension.
Fey gems can be cut to smaller pieces by using a stone cutter. The knowledge on how to increase the quality of a fey gem is said to be only known by the dwarves.
Fey ore can also be found in Deepslate veins. The Fey ore is better preserved in Deepslate and will have a slightly higher chance of dropping higher quality gems.
feywild_lexicon.entry.feywild.feywild.fe: To create the summoning scroll for a specific fey you will requires a Fey Altar, which can be crafted or can be found at places of worship in small villages.
With the right ingredients and incantation written on a summoning scroll with magic ink, you can summon back a Fey.
A Mandrake Seed can be found in the Fey trees. Once a normal tree is corrupted by the fey's magic some of its seeds will turn into a mandrake seed.
By completing questlines for your pixie you can obtain the Feywild teleportation Orb. The quest is repeatable should you loose the orb.

During the questline the pixie will ask you to capture a fey with an eye of ender. When returning the pixie orb to your pixie she will grant it special powers wich allow you to travel back and forth from the feywild.
feywild_lexicon.entry.feywild.feywild.ha: You can $(bold)summon$() a fey by $(bold)right clicking a fey summoning scroll on a block$(). Once used you get a empty summoning scroll back. Each Fey has it's own summoning scroll and the recipes for each fey can be found on their corresponding pages or by using JEI.
By $(bold)left clicking$() your fey with an $(bold)empty summoning scroll$() when it's stationary you can $(bold)return$() your fey into the summoning scroll.
Some fey follow you around the world. You can make a fey either $(bold)follow$() or $(bold)stay$() by interacting with them while holding $(bold)shift and right clicking$().
You can open the $(bold)quest$() window for pixies by $(bold)right clicking them with an empty hand$().
You can $(bold)gift an item$() to the fey for a quest by $(bold)right clicking them with the item required$()
feywild_lexicon.entry.feywild.feywild.in: Did you ever find your shoes laced together after a good nights sleep? The sugar in your tea has suddenly turned to salt? Did you ever travel through the forest swearing you see something just in the corner of your eye or hearing the giggle of children's voices? Don't fret, you're not going mad! It's just the local fey showing you they care for you in

their own very special way. Fey are pranksters, tricksters who enjoy teasing us big folk. Most of the time they are harmless, but just as with us, there might be a bad seed or two amongst them. It's hard to gain the trust of a fairy, as they see the world in a different way that we do.

If you want to learn more about the Fey, you may want to visit a Library and speak to one of the librarians there. They also have guide books on magic, depending what magic you brought to the Feywild. If he is not present just ring the bell.
feywild_lexicon.entry.feywild.feywild.qu: All the pixies have a quest-line. After summoning one you can access quests by right clicking the pixie with an empty hand. The Pixie first asks you to accept a contract and you will become a Ally of that Court.
Depending on your configuration aligning yourself with a court could cause other fey to leave! By default this is turned off.
feywild_lexicon.entry.feywild.feywild.se: The fey trees will also drop fey dust when you cut down their leaves.
Flowers from the spring season will grow around the tree.
The Winter tree will be covered in snow and coldness.
Some use Hexerei to corrupt fey magic. In places where the magic has been corrupted a hexen tree will grow.
An area blessed by a arch fey will grow a special fey blossom tree.
Sometimes the magic of the feywild will leaves crackes in the tree's structure. Using feydust on the cracked log will only scar the block more.
Flowers from the summer season will grow around the tree and sometimes the tree may be a home for the Summer Court's bees.
The area around the tree will soon be filled with fallen leaves. To ward of evil spirits sometimes a carved pumpkin may appear.
feywild_lexicon.entry.feywild.introducti: Did you ever find your shoes laced together after a good night's sleep? Or the sugar in your tea suddenly turn to salt? Did you ever travel through the forest swearing you saw something in the corner of your eye or hearing the giggle of a child's voice? Don't fret, you're not going mad! It's just the local Fey showing you that they care for you in their own very special way.

The Fey are pranksters- tricksters who enjoy teasing us big folk. Most of the time they are harmless, but just as with us, there may be a bad seed or two amongst them. It's hard to gain the trust of the Fey, as they see the world in a different way that we do.
feywild_lexicon.entry.feywild.neutral_co: Tree ents are fey who over time started to resemble the trees they are guarding. Tree Ents will attack anyone who they think doesn't belong in their territory. When summoned they won't attack players.
Tree ents can be healed by giving them logs of their resembling trees. You can also give them a cookie if you want to spoil them.
Bone meal will make them grow saplings and their auras will expand more granting their owners special enhancements. The Blossom tree might also drop apples.

Tree ents are fey who over time became started to resemble the trees they are guarding. Tree Ents will attack anyone who they think doesn't belong in their territory. When summoned they won't attack players.
Tree ents can be healed by giving them logs of their resembling trees. You can also give them a cookie if you want to spoil them.
Bone meal will make them grow saplings and their auras will expand more granting their owners special enhancements

Hexen tree ents, are ents who are corrupted by Hexerei. The witch who summoned them, used their aura and fey dust to get access to all kinds of magic stored in the fey dust. The magic is very volatile and may not always grant the owner a desired enchantment.

Pixies originally didn't have wings. After the fall of Light and Dark, the Courts where divided. Not knowing where they where from the pixies longing to return to the stars gave them wings.$(br)$(br)You can receive your own Pixie Wings by completing the quest line.
feywild_lexicon.entry.feywild.spring_cou: Spring Court
Mandragora

As if touched by a fey spirit, mandragoras are typically bright and cheerful optimists, ready to laugh, frolic and enjoy life and nature. They sprout from their less charming relatives, the mandrakes.
By feeding a mandrake their favorite food, a magical honey cookie, they will sprout into a Mandragora. A Mandragora will take care of your garden, and her lovely singing voice might even
grow crops.
You can use a Mandrake Seed to change the Type of the Mandragora.
Sometimes other mods may prevent you from summoning a Mandragora with a Honey Cookie, then try creating a Summoning Scroll.
The magical Honey cookie can be found in the Golden Seelie Fields. There will be a structure called the Beekeep, where the summer Court protects their honey.

Bouncy, bubbly, and completely devoid of the idea of personal space, the Fey of the Spring Court treat everything as if they have never seen it before. They are like hyperactive children- always wondering what everything is, stuffing anything into their mouth that seems remotely edible, and only particularly concerned about not having enough fun or food for the day. They represent the birth of a new year and the coming of new life, and are the most innocent of the
Courts. However, they are notoriously obnoxious when playing pranks- as they do not know of the dangers or consequences of their actions. ...Nor do they care about that, for that matter!

You can find Giant Dandelions in three variations: budding, flowering, and the flower's well known fluff- ready to scatter its seeds to the wind. The flower will also drop dandelion seeds, which can be planted to grow your own giant dandelions.
Spring Court

Bouncy, bubbly and completely void of the idea of personal space, the fey of the Spring Court treat everything as if they have never seen it before. They are like hyperactive children, always wondering what everything is, stuffing anything into their mouth that seems slightly edible and their only concern is not having either enough fun

or food for the day. They represent the birth of a new year and the coming of new life and are the most innocent of the Courts. They are however, notoriously obnoxious when playing pranks, as they do not know the dangers or consequences of their actions. Nor do they care about it.
Blossoming Wealds

In the Blossoming Wealds you can find giant dandelions. The giant dandelion has three variations; a bud, a flower and the flower's well known fluff. The flower will also drop dandelion seeds, which can be used to grow your own giant dandelions.
Spring Pixie

Beware that when you summon a pixie, you are bound to their Court! This means other courts might not be willing to interact with you afterwards. Also note that not all pixies are willing familiars, and they might trick you! Try interacting with your pixie after you summoned one, if possible try to gain their trust.

With this scroll you can summon a Spring Pixie. The presence of a Spring Pixie will make the animals fall in love with each other. The summoned pixie will follow you by shift-right clicking her, if you want her to stay at a certain position, shift-right click her again.
Pixies love cookies, as most fey do! When they are hungry you can give them a cookie and it will heal some of their health.
You can change your pixie's ability with a runestone. Dwarves will know more about these runestones.
Pixie Wings

Pixies originally didn't have wings. After the fall of Light and Dark, the Courts where divided. Not knowing where they where from the pixies longing to return to the stars gave them wings.$(br)$(br)You can receive your own Pixie Wings by completing the quest line.
You can repair pixie wings with fey dust.
Spring Tree Ent

Tree ents are fey who over time started to resemble the trees they are guarding. Tree Ents will attack anyone who they think doesn't belong in their territory. When summoned they won't attack players.
Tree ents can be healed by giving them logs of their resembling trees. You can also give them a cookie if you want to spoil them.
Bone meal will make them grow saplings and their auras will expand more granting their owners special enhancements. The Spring tree ent will also drop a variation of flowers.
feywild_lexicon.entry.feywild.summer_cou: Summer Court
Bee Knight
The Bee Knights patrol the Golden Seelie Fields, looking for anyone who tries to steal their sacred honey.

The best honey of the Summer Court is kept at the Bee Keep. The Bee Keep is protected by several Bee Knights. The Sacred Honey Comb is kept in a glass display. The display can be broken by left clicking it rapidly so it will break, and the golden treasure is yours.
With this scroll you can summon a Bee Knight. The Bee Knight will protect the area from other creatures interacting with it.

The Summer Court is the primary reigning Court within the Feywild, and they know it! Haughty and demanding, they expect everyone who addresses them to treat them as the royals they are. The other Courts and inhabitants of the Feywild are there to serve them, and though polite, they demand recognition of their self-proclaimed royal status.

The Summer Court defends the Feywild from intruders who seek to take a hold of the Faerie Court's riches; they are more combat-focused than the other Courts as a result- quick to answer any threat or opposition with their righteous judgment.
You can find Giant Sunflowers, which will turn to face the sun's position in the sky. They can also drop sunflower seeds, which can be used to grow your own giant sunflowers.
Summer Court

The Summer Court is the primary reigning Court within the Feywild and they know it. Haughty and demanding, they expect anyone who addresses them to treat them as the royals they are. The other Courts and inhabitants of the Feywild are there to serve them, and though polite, they demand recognition of their self-claimed royal status.

The Summer Court defend the Feywild against intruders which seek to take a hold of the Faerie Court's riches and are more combat orientated then the other Courts. They are quick to answer any threat or opposition with their righteous judgment.
Golden Seelie Fields

In the Golden Seelie Fields you can find giant sunflowers. The giant sunflowers will face the sun's position. The flower will also drop sunflower seeds, which can be used to grow your own giant sunflowers.
Summer Pixie

The Summer Court is the primary reigning Court within the Feywild and they know it. Beware that when you summon a pixie, you are bound to their Court! This means other courts might not be willing to interact with you afterwards. Also note that not all pixies are willing familiars, and they might trick you! Try interacting with your pixie after you summoned one, if possible try to gain their
trust.

With this scroll you can summon a Summer Pixie. As a proud member of the Summer Court the Summer Pixie will smite down her foes. The summoned pixie will follow you by shift-right clicking her, if you want her to stay at a certain position, shift-right click her again.
Pixies love cookies, as most fey do! When they are hungry you can give them a cookie and it will heal some of their health.
You can change your pixie's ability with a runestone. Dwarves will know more about these runestones.
Pixie Wings

Pixies originally didn't have wings. After the fall of Light and Dark, the Courts where divided. Not knowing where they where from the pixies longing to return to the stars gave them wings.$(br)$(br)You can receive your own Pixie Wings by completing the quest line.
You can repair pixie wings with fey dust.
Summer Tree Ent

Tree ents are fey who over time started to resemble the trees they are guarding. Tree Ents will attack anyone who they think doesn't belong in their territory. When summoned they won't attack players.
Tree ents can be healed by giving them logs of their resembling trees. You can also give them a cookie if you want to spoil them.
The Summer Tree ent has attracted some bees, giving him a magical honey cookie might lure some of them out of their hives.
Bone meal will make them grow saplings and their auras will expand more granting their owners special enhancements.
feywild_lexicon.entry.feywild.winter_cou: Winter Court
Allay

Allay are spirits of lost Feys. Their only purpose is to find lost items and return it to their owners. The Winter Court's Reapers have made use of these little allays to retrieve souls shards. However, the Allay are not loyal to the winter court, and will aid whom ever they can.
You can try give them a cookie, but they will just return it to you.

When the leaves have fallen, the sky has turned to gray, and the night closed in on the day- that's when the Winter Court reigns supreme in the Feywild. These Fey are apathetic to the living and their power struggles; eventually death will come for us all, and their purpose is to make sure the Feywild sees another turn of the year.

Winter Fey tend to be soft spoken, slightly morbid, and never choose their words without thinking about them. They seem to be a bit on the awkward side in social dealings, and some prefer the company of the dead.
The Giant Crocuses will open their flowers during the day and close them at night. The flower will also drop crocus seeds, which can be used to grow your own giant crocus.
Winter's Reaper Scythe
The winter reaper scythe grants special abilities to a player aligned to the Winter Court.
With the reaper scythe you can collect soul shards from the undead.
With the reaper scythe you can sometimes take the head of a undead monster.
You can combine the captured souls into a soul gem. You can restore the soul to the world of the living. But if the soul is incomplete, an undead version may spawn
You can repair the scythe with lesser fey gems.
Winter Court

When leaves have fallen and the sky has turned to gray and the night has closed in on the day. That's when the Winter Court reigns supreme in the Feywild. These fey are not concerned with the living and their power struggles. Eventually death will come for us all and their purpose is to make sure the Feywild sees another turn of the year.

They may seem cold and sullen at a first glance, but they will warm up to anyone who is willing to help the Feywild to its harshest most deadly period. Winter fey tend to be soft spoken, slightly morbid and never choose their words without thinking about them. They seem to be a bit on the awkward side when it comes to social dealings, and some prefer the company of the dead.
Frozen Retreat

In the Frozen Retreat you can find giant crocuses. The giant crocus will open it's flower during the day and will close at night. The flower will also drop crocus seeds, which can be used to grow your own giant crocus.
Winter Pixie

They may seem cold and sullen at a first glance, but they will warm up to anyone who is willing to help the Feywild to its harshest most deadly period. Beware that when you summon a pixie, you are bound to their Court! This means other courts might not be willing to interact with you afterwards. Also note that not all pixies are willing familiars, and they might trick you! Try interacting with your pixie
after you summoned one, if possible try to gain their trust.

With this scroll you can summon a Winter Pixie. The Winter Pixie will occasionally summon back a soul into a snowman's body. The summoned pixie will follow you by shift-right clicking her, if you want her to stay at a certain location, shift-right click her again.
Pixies love cookies, as most fey do! When they are hungry you can give them a cookie and it will heal some of their health.
You can change your pixie's ability with a runestone. Dwarves will know more about these runestones.
Pixie Wings

Pixies originally didn't have wings. After the fall of Light and Dark, the Courts where divided. Not knowing where they where from the pixies longing to return to the stars gave them wings.$(br)$(br)You can receive your own Pixie Wings by completing the quest line.
You can repair pixie wings with fey dust.
Winter Tree Ent

Tree ents are fey who over time started to resemble the trees they are guarding. Tree Ents will attack anyone who they think doesn't belong in their territory. When summoned they won't attack players. The Winter Tree Ents are not hostile towards undead as they grew accustom to their presence.
Tree ents can be healed by giving them logs of their resembling trees. You can also give them a cookie if you want to spoil them.
Bone meal will make them grow saplings and their auras will expand more granting their owners special enhancements
By right clicking your fey with a Pixie Orb, you can open the Fey Menu. Each fey has one. In this menu you can turn on/off their ability, make them follow or stay or you can dismiss them go back into the summoning scroll.
A Mandragora’s singing will sprout flowers in her nearby surroundings. The type of flowers that appear depends on the Mandragora’s variant.
The Mandragora loves Cookies, as most Fey do! You can give a hungry Fey cookies to restore some of their health.
feywild_lexicon.entry.mandragora.trade.p: The Mandragora offers various trades in exchange for a Fey Gem. Trades can include flowers and rare seeds that grow giant flowers that can only be found in the Feywild.
feywild_lexicon.entry.mandragora.variant: By right clicking the Mandragora with certain flowers, it will change its appearance. Her song will now grow types of that flower. Dismissing her will also remove the variant that is set.
feywild_lexicon.entry.pixies.autumn_pixi: A caretaker through and through, the Autumn Pixie is happy to look after anyone who comes to her. Though not particularly inclined to venture out into the larger world, she knows much about the mysteries of the Feywild and will do her best to support those she cares about.
An Autumn Pixie summoned by this scroll will harvest items from crops nearby. As a reminder, you can open a menu with options to toggle on/off her ability by interacting with her with a Pixie Orb.
Pixies love Cookies, as most Fey do! You can give a hungry Fey cookies to restore some of their health.
feywild_lexicon.entry.pixies.spring_pixi: Commonly seen frolicking in the Blossoming Wealds without a care in the world, the Spring Pixie is often called the cutest and sweetest of the Fey- and she's more than happy to explore the world and make new friends. Just don't forget that sweetness and kindness are two different things!

A Spring Pixie summoned by this scroll will cast a spell that causes nearby animals to fall in love (if the right conditions are met for breeding). As a reminder, you can open a menu with options to toggle on/off her ability by interacting with her with a Pixie Orb.
Pixies love Cookies, as most Fey do! You can give a hungry Fey cookies to restore some of their health.
feywild_lexicon.entry.pixies.summer_pixi: In the Summer Court, even the smallest Pixie is endowed with the status and authority of their Court- and they'll make sure you remember that! If you manage to earn the favor of such a Fey, however, then you may gain a potent ally who will help guide you through thick and thin.

A Summer Pixie summoned by this scroll will cast a spell that will cast sunlight on nearby crops making them grow. As a reminder, you can open a menu with options to toggle on/off her ability by interacting with her with a Pixie Orb.
Pixies love Cookies, as most Fey do! You can give a hungry Fey cookies to restore some of their health.
feywild_lexicon.entry.pixies.winter_pixi: As with the rest of her Court, the Winter Pixie is soft-spoken, fairly withdrawn, and often given to... morbid interests. Cold and sullen at a first glance, they will often warm up to those willing to help the Feywild through its harshest and deadliest season.

A Winter Pixie summoned by this scoll will gather part of a animal nearby, leaving behind their item drops. As a reminder, you can open a menu with options to toggle on/off her ability by interacting with her with a Pixie Orb.
Pixies love Cookies, as most Fey do! You can give a hungry Fey cookies to restore some of their health.
By right clicking your fey with a Pixie Orb, you can open the Fey Menu. Each fey has one. In this menu you can turn on/off their ability, make them follow or stay or you can dismiss them go back into the summoning scroll.
A Shroomling sneezing near a cow might infect it with the 'shrooms, turning the cow into a Mooshroom. The type of Mooshroom it becomes depends on the Shroomling’s variant.

Shearing a Mooshroom cow will give the corresponding mushrooms. Milking the mooshroom by right clicking it with a bowl gives a Suspicious brew, the effect of the stew depends on the mooshroom's variant.
The Shroomling loves Cookies, as most Fey do! You can give a hungry Fey cookies to restore some of their health.
feywild_lexicon.entry.shroomling.trade.p: The Shroomling offers different kinds of trades in exchange for a Fey Gem. Trades can include mushrooms, stews, and potions.
The Shroomling will offer a colorful range of rare mushrooms only found in the feywild. By right clicking the Shroomling with these mushrooms, will change it's appearance.
feywild_lexicon.entry.shroomling.variant: Right-clicking a Shroomling with an orange mushroom will change its hat to match the mushroom. Additionally, when the Shroomling sneezes, any affected Mooshroom will match the orange mushroom. Shearing the Mooshroom yields orange mushrooms, and milking it produces a Suspicious Stew.

Right-clicking a Shroomling with an yellow mushroom will change its hat to match the mushroom. Additionally, when the Shroomling sneezes, any affected Mooshroom will match the yellow mushroom. Shearing the Mooshroom yields yellow mushrooms, and milking it produces a Suspicious Stew.

Right-clicking a Shroomling with an green mushroom will change its hat to match the mushroom. Additionally, when the Shroomling sneezes, any affected Mooshroom will match the green mushroom. Shearing the Mooshroom yields green mushrooms, and milking it produces a Suspicious Stew.

Right-clicking a Shroomling with an light_blue mushroom will change its hat to match the mushroom. Additionally, when the Shroomling sneezes, any affected Mooshroom will match the light_blue mushroom. Shearing the Mooshroom yields light_blue mushrooms, and milking it produces a Suspicious Stew.

Right-clicking a Shroomling with an blue mushroom will change its hat to match the mushroom. Additionally, when the Shroomling sneezes, any affected Mooshroom will match the blue mushroom. Shearing the Mooshroom yields blue mushrooms, and milking it produces a Suspicious Stew.

Right-clicking a Shroomling with an purple mushroom will change its hat to match the mushroom. Additionally, when the Shroomling sneezes, any affected Mooshroom will match the purple mushroom. Shearing the Mooshroom yields purple mushrooms, and milking it produces a Suspicious Stew.

Right-clicking a Shroomling with an pink mushroom will change its hat to match the mushroom. Additionally, when the Shroomling sneezes, any affected Mooshroom will match the pink mushroom. Shearing the Mooshroom yields pink mushrooms, and milking it produces a Suspicious Stew.
feywild_lexicon.entry.summoning_fey.fey_: In order to summon the Fey you will need a Fey Altar- which can be crafted in a crafting table.

With the right combination of ingredients to establish a sympathetic link to your desired Fey, and the incantation written on a summoning scroll with magic ink, you can summon Fey out of the Feywild and into your realm.
Be Careful; Mandrakes can be very loud when grown. Growing a mandrake requires farm land.
feywild_lexicon.entry.summoning_fey.hand: You can summon a fey by $(italic)using their Summoning Scroll on a block$(); the scroll will vanish. Each kind of Fey has their own summoning scroll, and the recipes for each can be found on their corresponding pages [or by using JEI/REI].

By right clicking your fey with a Pixie Orb, you can open the Fey Menu. Each fey has one. In this menu you can turn on/off their ability, make them follow or stay or you can dismiss them back into the summoning scroll.
Fey creatures shun iron, for its cold touch dampens their magic and kills their spirits.
feywild_lexicon.entry.tree_ents.cracked_: Fey Trees have a chance to spawn with cracked wood. The spirit of A Tree Ent is stored in this cracked wood. During day time A Tree Ent can spawn near the Tree protecting it. During night the spirit, like their tree cousins will go to sleep.
The link between the tree and the Tree ent can be severed by destroying the scarred wood, providing a Fey Gem. Other way around placing a fey gem inside a Fey Log will make it a scarred log.
feywild_lexicon.entry.tree_ents.summon.p: Tree Ents are whispered into being by the forest itself, awakened by Feywild magic to guard the living forests. Slow to stir yet unwavering in purpose, they walk as both sentinel and sanctuary. Those who earn their trust may find an Ent willing to carry them upon its back, lending its strength to travelers who honor the wild.
By right clicking your fey with a Pixie Orb, you can open the Fey Menu. Each fey has one. In this menu you can ask for their blessing, mount them or make them go back into the summoning scroll.
The Blessing of a Tree Ent will wrap you in a magical wind that eases your movement and pushes away evil spirits who try to approach you.
Tree Ents you summon are friendly enough to offer you a ride on their sturdy backs.
Wild Tree Ents will attack anyone they deem a treat to their linked Tree. I wouldn't recommend giving them a Cookie, But! You can certainly try! Bone meal will Heal your Tree Ent.
Unlike other Fey, Tree ents don't have a weakness or fear to Iron.
